check-list: list-none p-0 m-0 mt-4 flex flex-col gap-3
check-list-li: text-[16px] leading-[1.55] text-[var(--konde-ink-700)] pl-6 relative before:content-['✓'] before:absolute before:left-0 before:top-0 before:text-[var(--konde-green)] before:font-bold before:text-[18px]
step-list: list-none p-0 m-0 flex flex-col gap-4
step-num: w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-[var(--konde-green)] text-white font-bold text-[16px] inline-flex items-center justify-center shrink-0
bullet-list: list-none p-0 m-0 flex flex-col gap-2
bullet-list-li: text-[16px] leading-[1.5] text-[var(--konde-ink-700)] pl-3.5 relative before:content-['·'] before:absolute before:left-0 before:-top-0.5 before:text-[var(--konde-green)] before:text-[22px] before:font-bold
